rationale: test_rdkafka_compression_codecs parameterizes over gzip/snappy/lz4/zstd, asserts key+payload round-trip equality, and handles librdkafka-unsupported codecs with codec-identifying errors plus an exercised>0 guard. Matches AC.

findings.summary: Received messages are compared positionally against the produced order; this relies on single-partition FIFO ordering for the auto-created topic. Holds in practice but could be made explicit by sorting by key if topic defaults ever change.

Unsupported-codec branch only triggers on producer creation failure; if librdkafka instead fails at first send, the test panics rather than recording it as 'unsupported'. Acceptable since the panic still clearly identifies the codec.
